title: Gerascanthus borinquensis
taxonomy: Gerascanthus borinquensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a type of shrub native to the Caribbean island of Puerto Rico. The classification of Gerascanthus borinquensis places it within the genus Gerascanthus, which is a part of the subfamily Rauvolfioideae. Gerascanthus borinquensis is closely related to other species within the same genus, sharing similar characteristics and traits. Further research may be necessary to fully understand its classification within the plant kingdom.
uses: Unfortunately, I was unable to find any information regarding the medicinal uses of Gerascanthus borinquensis.
